hypothesis: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) applied to language models fine-tuned on BCC/B2 alloy data will yield generated candidates with higher mean reward scores and better fulfillment of the synthesis objectives (BCC/B2 phase coexistence, BCC forming first, B2 existing at room temperature, and <10% non-BCC/B2 phases) than models trained with SFT alone or baseline methods.
